If you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask!

In Guangdong, you can choose from the following districts:

- Shenzhen
- Guangzhou

Could you please share your phone number? It should be between 7 to 15 digits, without any prefix.
why cant set district Guangzhou

You cannot set the district to Guangzhou because your selected state is Guangdong, which only allows Shenzhen as the district option. If you would like to change your district, you can only select Shenzhen under Guangdong.

Got it! I've noted your details so far.

Under Guangdong, you can choose from the following districts: Shenzhen and Guangzhou.

Could you please provide your phone number?

In Kerala, there are 14 districts. The districts include Alappuzha, Ernakulam, Kottayam, Thiruvananthapuram, and others.
